text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is injured, so I bring her to the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... If I had something sweet to eat, I'm sure I'd
feel aaall better.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... If I had something sweet to eat, I'm sure I'd
feel aaall better.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... I'm totally dying to read the magazine feature that's out today...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I think I wanna take a cute pic outside
under the sky.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I can't do anything strenuous, so you'll
have to give me a piggyback, 'kay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I can't do anything strenuous, so you'll
have to give me a piggyback, 'kay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it's because she's injured or just
because she's supposed to be injured, but she
sure seems to have a lot of requests...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it's because she's injured or just
because she's supposed to be injured, but she
sure seems to have a lot of requests...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okaaay. Ehe, you're so nice.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okaaay. Ehe, you're so nice.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...But you can be a little grumpier if you want.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean... I'm injured, so I'm not even cute right
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up taking care of Curren Chan all day so her
injury can heal.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ☆ You got me.
choice_data_list: ...Do you want to get back to training?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Just lazing around isn't very cute, and I do kinda feel like moving around a bit.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: See? Look at how much...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: See? Look at how much...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Ehehe, whoopsie. ☆ That was only a one-time
thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Curren Chan's condition remains poor
even after that, so I decide to have her rest for
the day.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Energy I have! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehe! ♪ Just you wait. I'm just gonna keep getting
cuter and cuter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, as if to make up for the time she spent in
bed, Curren Chan pours her heart and soul into
training.
